ogTitle: Eaglehawk Neck vs East Cam: Climate Safety

heading: Eaglehawk Neck vs East Cam — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Eaglehawk Neck, Tasmania and East Cam, Tasmania. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Eaglehawk Neck has a lower overall climate risk score (32/100) compared to East Cam (34/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Eaglehawk Neck or East Cam safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Eaglehawk Neck has a flood risk score of 21/100, while East Cam scores 27/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Eaglehawk Neck scores 21/100 for bushfire risk. East Cam scores 53/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Eaglehawk Neck or East Cam?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Eaglehawk Neck has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.62% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
